At the heart of AMI’s data center solutions is the AMI Meridian™ SaaS platform: a unified, cloud-native environment that delivers management, security, firmware lifecycle and AI-driven analytics as modular services.

AMI Meridian ties together Aptio, MegaRAC and Tektagon firmware with AMI’s AI infrastructure management solutions like AMI Data Center Manager and AMI Rack Manager, enabling customers to manage heterogeneous environments securely and efficiently.

excerpt.rendered: Data Center Services and AI-Powered Infrastructure ManagementAt the heart of AMI’s data center solutions is the AMI Meridian™ SaaS platform: a unified, cloud-native environment that delivers management, security, firmware lifecycle and AI-driven analytics as modular services. AMI Meridian ties together Aptio, MegaRAC and Tektagon firmware with AMI’s AI infrastructure management solutions like AMI Data Center […]
